## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Safety and compatibility

- [ ] The non-destructive Git contract is preserved.
- [ ] English and Russian UI resources were updated together, when applicable.
- [ ] EDT compatibility or extension-point changes are documented.

## Verification

- [ ] `mvn clean verify` passes.
- [ ] Tests cover the changed behavior.
- [ ] Screenshots are attached for visible UI changes, or are not applicable.
